description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3.3 Docker image and caches the vendor directory. Add a pages job (stage deploy) that runs apt-get update -yqqq, apt-get install -y nodejs, bundle install --path vendor, and bundle exec middleman build, then publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact and only runs on the master branch. Add a test job (stage test) that runs the same four commands, but is executed on all branches except master. Both jobs inherit the cache and no additional services are required.
